title: Orchard Toys Big Fire Engine Jigsaw Puzzle, 20 Piece Shaped Educational Jigsaw Puzzle For Kids, Toddlers, Ages 2-5, Develops Hand-Eye Coordination
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 20-Piece Shaped Jigsaw Puzzle: Big Fire Engine is a 20-piece jigsaw puzzle featuring bold chucky pieces, perfect for little hands, offering an engaging challenge for young children as they work to assemble the colourful fire engine.

Colourful Fire Engine and Crew: Featuring a bright, cheerful fire engine and its fun animal crew, this puzzle sparks curiosity and imagination. Children will enjoy piecing together the vibrant scene, filled with details to discover and discuss as they go.

Includes Poster and Fun Learning Guide: Along with the puzzle, Big Fire Engine comes with a large wall poster and a fun learning guide. These additional tools make it easy to extend learning beyond the puzzle, encouraging further conversation about fire engines, teamwork, and more.

Develops Problem-Solving and Fine Motor Skills: As children piece together the fire engine, they’re building key skills such as problem-solving, hand-eye coordination, and fine motor control. This puzzle provides a hands-on way for kids to enhance these essential abilities.

Encourages Conversation and Imagination: The detailed fire engine and crew scene opens up opportunities for storytelling and imaginative play. Parents and children can discuss the different roles of the fire crew, creating a fun learning experience alongside the puzzle challenge.
description: From the manufacturer Sound the alarm! The Orchard Toys Big Fire Engine puzzle is perfect for little ones who love action-packed adventures. With 20 chunky, easy-to-handle pieces, children will enjoy assembling the vibrant scene of firefighter animals racing to the rescue in their bright red engine. Designed with young children in mind, this large puzzle encourages hand-eye coordination, problem-solving skills, and imaginative play. The bold colours and friendly characters capture children's attention, while the included activity guide helps parents extend the fun with discussion points. Key Features: 20-piece giant floor puzzle – Ideal for ages 3 and up Bright and engaging illustration – Full of fun details to spot and talk about Educational play – Supports early learning skills, including matching, dexterity, and vocabulary Durable and wipe-clean – Made from sturdy, recycled board Designed in the UK – Trusted quality from Orchard Toys Whether it’s a rainy day indoors or a fun activity with the family, the Big Fire Engine puzzle makes the perfect gift for little puzzle lovers and aspiring heroes alike! Encourages hand-eye coordination and children match and place puzzle pieces together Sparks conversation through detailed illustrations that prompt children to describe what they see and tell their own rescue stories Builds observational skills as children spot and identify details within the busy fire engine scene Spread out the 20 chunky pieces on a flat surface, then help your child find the edges and corners to build the frame. Encourage them to match colours and shapes to complete the vibrant fire engine scene. Once finished, use the included activity guide to spark conversations about what’s happening in the picture—like who’s driving the engine or what the firefighters are doing. It’s a fun, hands-on way to support early learning through play!
